description_long: This lamp features a highly unusual, humanoid form with an elongated, emaciated torso and limbs, and a long, thin neck that culminates in a streetlamp-style head. The body is textured with a rough, mottled grayish surface, resembling weathered skin or stone, and the arms are disproportionately long, ending in claw-like hands. The lamp head is a black, cylindrical fixture, seamlessly attached to the end of the neck, and is reminiscent of a modern urban streetlight. The overall posture is upright and rigid, with the lamp head projecting outward, suggesting a functional lighting purpose. The design is both unsettling and striking, blending organic and industrial elements in a surreal manner. This lamp would stand out dramatically in any urban environment, serving as both a light source and a sculptural statement.
description: A humanoid, emaciated lamp with a long neck ending in a streetlamp head, featuring rough, grayish skin and elongated limbs. The design merges organic and industrial aesthetics for a surreal urban presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full humanoid torso, long arms, and the lamp head facing forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the extreme thinness of the body and the forward-projecting lamp head.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back musculature and the lamp head extending directly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the lamp's profile and the curvature of the neck.
